programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: When the Municipal Corporation puts a hold on Sachin Tichkule's payment, a berk but ambitious municipal contractor, he decides to sue them. But matters worsen when the new municipal commissioner turns out to be his former girlfriend.

programme.title: Guddu Ki Gun
programme.desc: A washing powder salesman, Guddu, finds himself in a quandary when his girlfriend's grandfather casts a spell on him after he ditches her. Guddu must now find true love and stay loyal to her in order to get rid of the curse.

programme.title: One Day: Justice Delivered
programme.desc: A judge bound by law has to pass unfair judgments on some criminal cases due to lack of evidence. After retirement, he becomes a vigilante and decides to punish the crooks who walk free.

programme.title: Aarakshan
programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: Pandigai
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Jaanbaaz Commando
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Patas
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Personal Interest
programme.desc: Tatiana makes her escape from prison and seeks a hideout in a remote village of Pavlovka, in her late grandmother's house. There she meets Maxim who has come to the village to take a break from the hectic city life. Instant chemistry sparks between them. Everything would be just fine were it not for Tatiana's ex-boyfriend, Oleg, who comes to the village looking for her. Tatiana is forced to tell Maxim the whole truth about herself. She tells him about the robbery she committed together with Oleg and how she took all the blame on herself and then escaped from prison. Maxim assures her that he will be by her side no matter what and will help her get through all this.

programme.title: How To Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A marriage therapist attempts to fix her own marriage by focusing on how to change her husband.

programme.title: The Lease
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: Measure of a Man
programme.desc: A teenager takes a summer job and learns how to stand up for himself.

programme.title: Category 7: The End Of The World
programme.desc: Scientists have been expounding theories of global-warming effects. Finally someone is listening.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Ming's troops are on a mission to steal ice from Frigia, so he enlists the Zurn to serve as his army.

programme.title: A Happening of Monumental Proportions
programme.desc: Comedy set in an elementary school, where bumbling administrators attempt to cover up an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Category 7: The End Of The World
programme.desc: Scientists have been expounding theories of global-warming effects. Finally someone is listening.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Midnight Ride
programme.desc: A house wife just left her cop husband, when she picks up Justin Mckay she'll wish she never did as she's plunged into a nightmare and the grip of a psychotic killer.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Khuda Kasam The Challenge
programme.desc: CBI officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man who is sentenced to prison for a crime he never committed.

programme.title: Kisaan
programme.desc: The story of a farmer, Maan Singh, who struggles to save his ancestral land from corrupt officials and greedy businessmen. With the help of his son, he fights against the system and stands up for his rights as a farmer. The movie highlights the challenges faced by farmers in modern India and explores themes of family, tradition, and social justice in a poignant and inspiring plot.

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: Banku and his parents move into their new home, the Nath Villa. Here, Banku meets the unfriendly ghost of the former owner. Not only does Banku befriend him but also helps him make his final journey.

programme.title: Once Upon Time In Mumbai Doobara
programme.desc: A gripping gangster film set in a world of crime and deceit. The story follows the battle for control of Mumbai between notorious gangster Shoaib and ambitious youth Aslam, as they navigate love, loyalty, and betrayal. With explosive action and unforgettable characters, this high-stakes journey takes you deep into the heart of the criminal underworld, where only the strongest will emerge victorious.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: A close-upof the aliens' feet as they walk into Jane and Jerry's room. They wake upto see the aliens have taken over their house. The aliens break the glass with laserbeams that come out of their eyes.Jane and Jerry run for their lives as the aliens chase them through the house. Janefinds a torch and uses it as a weapon to defend herself

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 05
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 01
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 01
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 01
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 02
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 03
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It' s countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer' s back is turned.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase' s father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: An evil logger, Lakkha, tries to turn a forest into his personal lumberyard. However, two bear brothers, Bablu and Dablu, set out to thwart his efforts and have many adventures while doing so.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: The goblins go on the attack. The elves are desperate. Colonel Daiman, plagued by a guilty conscience, comes to their aid at the last second...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly wakes up at night, she is terrified of the storm. The curtains in her room have taken on strange shapes and she suddenly fears that curtain monsters are hiding behind them. To be on the safe side, she has to pull the curtain back somehow. So she invents a "fear repeller" to help her pull back the curtains. When she finally succeeds, she discovers that Black Cat has hidden behind the curtain with her friends. So Milly no longer has any reason to be afraid of the storm.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The Da Boom Crew has landed in a remote desert town inhabited by rather strange-looking aliens. The aliens ask the kids to ask the Great Protector for help...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Krupnik, Fire, Nevin and Gaius fall into the hacker's trap.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: An evil professor launches Operation Saturn! He captures Bob to shoot him onto Saturn with a rocket. Bob's friends must prevent this at all costs...

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: It's project day at school. The task is to start an advertising campaign in pairs. Gloria comes up with the idea of advertising her father's handicrafts. She designs brochures and distributes them...

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Snakehammer of all people, the ingenious goblin inventor, loses his memory by a stupid accident. When he wakes up from his unconsciousness, he finds himself among the trolls...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Lupo cuts up and gets into trouble when his Rie-sendrachen pulls him into the air... / F&F can earn a few pennies by cleaning out Uncle Fax's garage, but unfortunately they also sell a vase that Fax needs and Grandma Eusebia has bought... / Lucky has broken a leg sits bored at his "window to the yard" and suddenly observes terrible things at his neighbor Old Snotty. One by one he sends his family over, but no one comes back. Lucky is overcome with panic.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Snakehammer of all people, the ingenious goblin inventor, loses his memory by a stupid accident. When he wakes up from his unconsciousness, he finds himself among the trolls...

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: The hotel owner Hartacker rallies the population against the crocodiles. He claims that the animals have killed a boy. But he himself is hiding the child. At first, the campaign is successful...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: Milly wants to surprise her father with a cake for his birthday. But while she is trying to mix the batter, the mixer gives up the ghost. But that's no reason for Milly to give up. She repairs the mixer and gives it to her father for his birthday along with the birthday cake. No wonder her father is delighted,

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: In search of the next Boom Cart, the kids land on the planet Gaffa. But immediately after landing, they are attacked by vicious Larvites...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Our four heroes make their way to Paul Revere.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Hurakan is holding Mara Mei captive. The chief is not to see her again until he agrees to her marriage! Bob and his friends must free Mara Mei...

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Lord Kann, the evil ruler of the goblins, is terminally ill. Daiman and Balabust know only one way out: they kidnap Fala, the healer of the elves, to cure Kann.

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Lupo rents out his attic room, but the lady is not quite right and has evil intentions. / Grandma Eusebia asks F&F to take her dog to the groomers, but Schnucki doesn't want to go to the cleaners. / F&F and her uncle go on vacation, but their luggage is stolen on the train. / An unwanted driving lesson for Lucky

programme.title: Extreme Iceland
programme.desc: Mike Wilson is stranded on the Vatnajökull glacier. If his team can help get him off the ice, the East Fjords are calling.

programme.title: Capturing Winter
programme.desc: Renowned winter photographer, Tristan Shu, attempts his dream project a photograph that combines astrophotography with action sports. His aim is to capture ski and snowboard tricks at night, set against the Milky-way and the spectacular Mont-Blanc.

programme.title: Kung Fu Wise
programme.desc: Kleber travels to Foshan and seeks out masters of two different lineages: Ip Man and Snake Style. First he visits the Ip Man lineage, based on the legendary kungfu master whose life story spawned hundreds of martial arts movies.

programme.title: Kung Fu Wise
programme.desc: In Foshan, Kleber seeks out Liu Weixin, a master of Pak Mei kungfu and on whom the hit game "Sifu" was based. He experiences this style's relentless and lightning-fast strikes, but also learns from its master how to balance life and kungfu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Wise
programme.sub-title: Kungfu-wise: Hung Ga & Choy Li Fut
programme.desc: In Foshan, China, Kleber meets with two masters of southern Chinese martial arts. He learns from a Hung Ga master and meets a master of Choy Li Fut, a kungfu style that utilizes everyday items such as towels, fans and even abacuses.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel
programme.desc: The transformation is complete and it's time for The Flying Kestrel to be put to the test.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel
programme.desc: The Flying Kestrel takes on the final records attempts, and the shocking results leave everyone reeling.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel
programme.desc: After driver Jon Webster crashes the Flying Kestrel at 148 mph, the team must work out what went wrong and have to decide if the dream of a land speed record is worth risking it all?

programme.title: Garage Dreams
programme.desc: The UK Hot Rod scene can be a lonely place. Passion drives this restorer on a weekly basis, one piece at a time. David dreams up car designs in his sleep and then brings them to life. The greasy hair gang hot up the road to Sydney.

programme.title: Garage Dreams
programme.desc: A restoration project with real class. The insiders guide to hipster car culture. Death stops the restoration until it becomes the reason to do it right. Heavy metal and spare parts make Ben a top shelf owner.

programme.title: Garage Dreams
programme.desc: Take your pick from the list as Marc walks through his immediate family. Rhys is sent on a mission to find an Old Tudor in the USA. Rod is 78 years old and still getting greasy. Barry makes sure his engineering work is perfected each build.

programme.title: Inside Oranje U21
programme.desc: Jong Oranje is up for their biggest challenge so far. In the quarter finals of the Euro's they face tournament favorite France. Striker Myron Boadu is set for the biggest moment of his career and the camera is right there when it happens.

programme.title: Inside Oranje U21
programme.desc: In the semi-finals of the Euro's Under 21, Jong Oranje will stand face to face with an old friend Germany. The two teams drew 1-1 earlier in the tournament. Will the masterplan of coach Erwin van de Looi secure the Orange boys a place in the final?

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: After a week, Kevin and Jalou find themselves in the same country again: Canada. They travel from Vancouver to Whistler for the final challenge.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: O Dyna Switchback, o Sportster 72 e o Softail Slim

programme.title: Rimac Concept One
programme.desc: The futuristic and extraordinary Rimac Concept One.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The 1971 BMW 02 Touring was considered an ugly duckling at the time, but is now a coveted car. Also: the solid technology and moderate prices of the Mercedes-Benz 114/115 made them the first "people's Mercedes".

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The Porsche 911 Targa with its lightweight construction is an iconic car. Also: the Lotus Seven Twin Cam SS is more pf a race than a road car. And: the 1930 Bentley Blower and the dainty British roadster, the Sunbeam Tiger.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The 1967 Ford Fairlane GTA in NASCAR trim. Also: the 1995 Chrysler 300 C was the most powerful production vehicle in the US. And: the 1949 Cadillac Series 62 convertible set new standards in terms of luxury.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The 1947 Triumph 1800 Roadster provides space for 5 fresh air fans. Also: Le Jog, the toughest classic car rally in Europe. A German women's team takes on the challenge in their VW Iltis. And: a charming oldie, the 1919 Wolseley Stellite.

programme.title: BMW M3
programme.desc: The BMW M3, BMW's most successful model ever.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A skidding lorry versus a remote-controlled van. Stunt coordinator Christoph Domanski`s plan is to separate the roof from the rest of the vehicle. If his idea works, the team will create a unique stunt convertible.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stunt man Dominik Kowalski is an expert for falls, drops and body stunts. Today, everything will be different as he is supposed to be the stunt car driver. His objective is to do a flip through a cola truck.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes have a new car cannon in their equipment arsenal that accelerates a car in one second from zero to 70 km/h. The team tests the cannon after shooting a wild car chase on the autobahn.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes turned a gravel quarry into their own stunt playground. This time, a motorbike without a driver flies over a ramp, a catapult for humans is tested and a new rollover punch is tried out in a fight scene.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Action Concept's stunt professionals are supposed to create a spectacular motobike jump with a subsequent crash that would be too dangerous for a stuntman. Stunt coordinator Ramazan Bulut has to come up with a solution.

programme.desc: Dan Aykroyd sheds light on shipwrecks, plane crashes and UFO sightings.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths attempt to forge their own versions of a ninja blade.

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best inspirational and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family purchase, sell and evaluate items with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: Andy works on an odd kit car while Dale builds a custom Harley for a nostalgic customer.

programme.title: Builders Of Bharat
programme.desc: Explore the foundation and progression of one of the most prominent builders of India.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry takes on a disciple and Lisa gets clinical with her find and takes a closer look.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, a haul of vinyl might save Dusty as Lisa learns that she needs her unit.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan reluctantly customises a Cadillac as part of a personal project.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A seller brings chef whites signed by the actor who played the Soup Nazi on Seinfeld.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy Calvin confuses profit with prophet but still manages to be successful.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn's antique doll collection takes a turn when she discovers spiritual companions.

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: The host meets a pair of siblings who use mirrors to shoot their targets.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: Two prisoners serving life sentences devise a plan to break free from Dannemora Prison.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Eco India
programme.desc: Eco india challenges natural conflicts with inter-human solutions as they reflect sustaining self and surrounding. From “Changing Flora and Fauna”, Urban Visions being Sustainable”, “Greening Up- creating solutions for greenhouse and global warming” leading us to know how we could “Help Nature, Help Humanity”. As they go head on with “Protecting Seafood and ocean life”, “Addressing industrial Pollution” , land pollution , water pollution , modern solutions to hazardous pollutants, tackling food and water shortage , Recycling batteries, sustainable ways of life , protecting environment with modern and technological development issues and many more to create a better world.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians it proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt-stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Night Stalker
programme.desc: A black bear charges Joe Azzouggagh and his German shepherd, Ace, deep in the Ontario wilderness single father Andrew Dickehage, forced to walk six miles along a rural road at night, comes under attack from unseen predators.

programme.title: Meet the Orangutans: Feeding Time
programme.desc: Lumi and Kacy are missing a former sanctuary resident tries to beg food from humans at an area nature reserve restaurant.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar await their new calves.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bosco The Croc's Big Move
programme.desc: Robert takes on the challenging task of relocating Bosco, the most aggressive croc at the zoo Bindi must investigate Forest the giraffe's bad knee problem Terri helps Harley the koala find love at the end of a difficult breeding season.

programme.title: Great White Shark Babies
programme.desc: Dr. Mauricio Hoyos teams up with Michelle Jewell and Toby Daly-Engel in search of where the pregnant females of Guadalupe have their pups. Mauricio believes they go to the coast of Baja, but what they find while they're there is a Shark Week first.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: The zoo's medical team must perform critical surgery on a bison calf born with a bowed leg three lynx kittens are ready to explore their exhibit the first known U.S. case of COVID-19 in animals is confirmed when a Malayan tiger tests positive.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians it proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt-stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.title: Rock The Park
programme.desc: Colton and Jack visit the parks of New York Harbor to learn about immigration and their own family history.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: The Verdict Is In: Nano or T-Rex
programme.desc: In Montana, Clayton Phipps prepares to learn if his carnivore skeleton belongs to a tyrannosaurus rex or the controversial nanotyrannus in Wyoming, Mike Harris and Aaron Bolan race against the impending winter digging at a promising new site.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Shawn's crew forages ahead to reach the 1,000-ounce goal the Kellys face blistering winds and monster currents as they move The Reaper into the sea.

programme.title: The Legend of Croc Gold: Gold Strike
programme.desc: Farley leads the team to a major gold strike, but a freak accident sidelines the crew and celebrations are short-lived as emergency medical treatment puts the mission in jeopardy.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahus North Shore, and filming George surfing with the Hawaian Fire firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Heres the deal: Mt.Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Heres the first kicker:High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave a cave created by the most unique form of erosion Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with thir tusks in order to eat the salty rock.Heres the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus the worlds most deadly virus.So heres the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George experiences the most extreme climates in North America. First he visits the hottest place on the continent Death Valley, then the coldest Snag, Yukon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George Kourounis returns to Tornado Alley with three of his fellow stormchasers to see what the 2007 Storm Season will bring. He gets a birthday gift of a large Kansas tornado, then travels to Missouri to witness a string of violent thunderstorms. Heading west to Crazy Horse Mountain, the team is in place for a huge storm sweeping through the Badlands of South Dakota.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the American Southwest during the Desert Monsoon. He ups the danger factor by traveling with wild atheist shock-jock R.J. Evans to track massive lightning storms which can produce bolts of up to one hundred million volts. The pair come close - too close - to dangerous electrical clouds swirling over Tucson, Sedona and Monument Valley.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is Wild Water our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile the area the South Americans call the Fin del Mundo the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat Northanger to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: The Demolition Man
programme.desc: Taking down eight giant towers will take expert precision, planning & explosives. It's imperative none of them fall in the wrong direction or fire any debris.

programme.title: The Demolition Man
programme.desc: An asbestos ridden 1960s building in the crowded City of London is to be demolished to make way for a new hotel.

programme.title: The Demolition Man

programme.title: Backyard Ballistics: Fully Loaded

programme.title: Trajectory
programme.desc: COLD WAR & THE START OF THE SPACE RACE – Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. SERVICING HUBBLE - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. CHASING A COMET - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.

programme.title: Trajectory
programme.desc: PROJECT MERCURY BEGINS - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. MARS EXPRESS - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. THE SOYUZ LAUNCH SYSTEM - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.

programme.title: Trajectory
programme.desc: PROJECT MERCURY ADVANCES - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. CAMERA TRACKING - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Is space exploration for everyone? From individuals who are deaf, to the developing world, host Emily Calandrelli highlights some hidden figures in this industry and shows how there's space...for all explorers.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Sending humans into space is always risky. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at a couple close calls on missions that have had to abort after launch, and examines steps being taken by NASA to prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Women Make Science

programme.title: Python Hunters

programme.title: Python Hunters

programme.title: Monkey Thieves

programme.title: Monkey Thieves

programme.desc: A conservation success story, the Cape fur seal numbers are healthy. But this has paradoxically thrown up serious conservation issues from protecting endangered seabird nesting sites, conflict with fishermen and seal culling.

programme.title: Yogacity
programme.desc: When overcome by the humdrum of the city, open yourself to yoga and find the method in all the madness. Yoga City is a series that helps you find the key to your own piece of calm within the City.

programme.desc: Meet Rocky and Mayur - the highway stars with an attitude! Their tastes change with every kilometer as they hitch-hike their way across the country.

programme.title: Chakh Le India-Kacha Rasta
programme.desc: The quirky Aditya Bal is back on the road, and in this case, on the 'kachcha raasta'. Yes! this time on CHAKH LE - INDIA Aditya hits the road less travelled into the unexplored, and forgotten pockets of India in his hunt for authentic flavours.

programme.title: Vicky Goes Veg

programme.title: Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas
programme.desc: Marut Sikka knows authentic Indian flavours like nobody else. From Kashmir to Kanyakumari, and West Bengal to Gujarat, he delves into the secrets of each region and brings out its special flavours.

programme.title: My Yellow Table
programme.desc: A cookery show wherein India's greatest master chef Kunal Kapoor shares his favourite recipes.

programme.title: No Big Deal
programme.desc: After looking forward to your vacation for months, the last thing you want to do is see how far you can stretch your budget. Join our travel host as she survives in the most exotic destinations with limited budget

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Punta Del Este, Uruguay
programme.desc: With sprawling beaches, iconic monuments and a unique mix of colonial and modern architecture, it is the jewel of Uruguay's southern coast. Often called the “Pearl of the Atlantic”, likened with Miami and Cannes, it is the city of Punta del Este.

programme.title: Voronezh town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was finished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: The Trinity Cathedral, Saint Petersburg, Russia
programme.desc: Spread out on the coast of the Gulf of Finland, at the mouth of the Neva River, St. Petersburg is the second-largest city in Russia. Witness of both military and civil history, the Trinity Cathedral of Izmailovsky, part of the historic center of St. Peter"&"sburg is a world heritage site.

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: HOTELS in Paris Part 4
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Known for its shipowners, captains, and countless treasures, the Island of Andros has been away from mass tourism for years, which works to its advantage!

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: When you're surrounded by breathtaking mountain landscapes, it would be easy to rely on tradition and stay the same. However, this destination does the exact opposite. Whether it's creating a state-of-the-art museum to honor the United States' greatest athletes, modernizing its natural attractions so they're accessible to all, or creating a community that invites success, there's excitement in the air for what is new and innovative. See why Colorado Springs, Colorado is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine's wild beauty. It's where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It's known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you'll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here's why Maine is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: In St. Augustine, Florida, wandering is encouraged and time is meant to be savored. It's a historic powerhouse of a destination where local events not only shaped its history but an entire country's. With an unexpected food scene, protected wetlands, and miles of beautiful beaches to explore, there's a lot to sink your (shark) teeth into. Join Samantha as she explores America's oldest city – St. Augustine, Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's digging in to all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill, and into the fryer when he visits Miami, FL, and Modesto and Stockton, CA.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits joints taking childhood favorites to a gourmet level. A Denver bar cooks up tater tots, pork rinds and a pastrami sandwich. A Tacoma spot turns out pork shoulder tacos, elk sliders and parmesan stuffed tater tots.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: High-octane dune racing in Winchester Bay, Oregon, plus high-flying Kitefest fun in Long Beach, Washington.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?
